title: ECharts Segment 05
summary: ECharts 5.2.1/5.2.2 release segment focusing on option type improvements (extensible series options, improved coordinate types), line chart fixes (gradient soft-clip, emphasis bolder revert, expand animation, polyline/polygon events), axis label hideOverlap feature, server-side rendering support, progressive rendering performance, nightly build infrastructure, calendar i18n, localization additions (PT-br, PL, RU), marker improvements, and several merge-from-master integration PRs.
instructionPreview: `/workspace/requirements/` contains every requirement as a separate file. Each file describes one change request. Read them all, implement every one. Order does not matter, but some changes depend on others.
instruction:
You are an autonomous engineer. The repository at /workspace is at an earlier state of a real-world project.

`/workspace/requirements/` contains every requirement as a separate file. Each file describes one change request. Read them all, implement every one. Order does not matter, but some changes depend on others.

moduleDag.description: ECharts 5.2.1/5.2.2 release segment focusing on option type improvements (extensible series options, improved coordinate types), line chart fixes (gradient soft-clip, emphasis bolder revert, expand animation, polyline/polygon events), axis label hideOverlap feature, server-side rendering support, progressive rendering performance, nightly build infrastructure, calendar i18n, localization additions (PT-br, PL, RU), marker improvements, and several merge-from-master integration PRs.

nodes.label: Core ECharts Engine
nodes.description: Core echarts entry, export modules (core.ts, option.ts), and ExtensionAPI. Heavily touched by release version bumps, server-side rendering support, progressive rendering performance, and the master-next merge integrations.

nodes.label: i18n Locale Bundles
nodes.description: Compiled locale bundles for PT-br, PL, and RU languages. New Polish localization and updates to Portuguese-Brazilian and Russian translations.

nodes.label: Chart Helpers
nodes.description: Shared drawing primitives (LineDraw, SymbolDraw, LargeLineDraw, LargeSymbolDraw). Updated as part of the symbol visual refactor and progressive rendering performance improvements.

nodes.label: Visual Mapping & Aria
nodes.description: Visual symbol mapping and aria accessibility processor. The symbol visual refactor and aria dataset labels fix are the primary contributors.

nodes.label: Line Chart
nodes.description: LineView, LineSeries, install, and poly modules. Major focus area with fixes for gradient between stops, soft-clip gradient, emphasis bolder revert, expand animation stop, point update animation, polyline/polygon events, and line stroke events.

nodes.label: Coordinate Systems & Scales
nodes.description: Axis models, scale implementations, axis helpers, coordinate creators, and scaleRawExtentInfo. Touched by the option types improvement (all axis models), axis-max-below-data fix, calendar i18n, and hideOverlap.

nodes.label: Utility & Type Definitions
nodes.description: Shared utilities including types.ts, format.ts, decal.ts, states.ts, and clazz.ts. Types improvement PR adds extensible series option support, format utilities updated for tooltip boolean format fix.

nodes.label: Misc Chart Types
nodes.description: Candlestick, boxplot, parallel, scatter, lines, effectScatter, funnel, graph, themeRiver, and map series. Broadly touched by the option types improvement and progressive rendering refactor.

nodes.label: Other Components
nodes.description: DataZoom, visualMap, toolbox, graphic, title, timeline, and axisPointer components. Updated for progressive rendering and the option types improvement propagation.

nodes.label: Axis & Legend Components
nodes.description: AxisBuilder, legend model/view, and axis tick label builder. The axisLabel hideOverlap feature and legend symbolKeepAspect fix are the main changes.

nodes.label: Build & Release Infrastructure
nodes.description: Nightly preparation scripts, source-release templates, and dev-fast. Covers next nightly publish automation, announcement download links, and patch version fixes for next builds.

nodes.label: Custom Series
nodes.description: CustomSeries and CustomView. Updated for the extensible series option types and progressive rendering improvements.

nodes.label: Marker Components
nodes.description: MarkArea, MarkLine, MarkPoint views and models plus markerHelper. The time-axis string markers fix and option types propagation are the main changes.

nodes.label: Bar Chart
nodes.description: BarView, BaseBarSeries, and BarSeries. Polar clockwise sector fix, bar race label animation, and option types propagation.

nodes.label: Render Pipeline & Views
nodes.description: Layout modules (barPolar, barGrid), view base classes (Chart, Component), and processor modules. Updated for progressive rendering and polar clockwise sector fix.

nodes.label: Sunburst Chart
nodes.description: SunburstSeries and sunburstLayout. The sunburst level radius fix and option types propagation.

nodes.label: Tooltip Component
nodes.description: TooltipView, TooltipHTMLContent, and TooltipModel. The tooltip pointer stability fix and tooltip boolean format fix.

nodes.label: Model Layer
nodes.description: Model.ts, Component base, Global model, Series model, and dataFormat mixin. Minor fixes for model typing and the master-next merge integration.

nodes.label: Label System
nodes.description: Label style, labelLayoutHelper, labelGuideHelper, and LabelManager. Updated for hideOverlap feature support and bar race label animation.

nodes.label: i18n Source & Legacy
nodes.description: In-source locale definitions (langPT-br, langRU, langPL) and legacy getTextRect module. New locale sources and getTextRect un-deprecation.

edges.label: core imports shared type definitions and utilities
axis components render from coordinate system models
coordinate types depend on shared type definitions
line chart registers with core lifecycle
line chart uses label layout for data points
line chart uses Symbol and SymbolDraw helpers
misc charts use shared drawing primitives
markers compute positions from coordinate APIs
chart helpers apply visual mapping results
build scripts compile locale source to bundles
source locales compiled into asset bundles
bar layout computed by pipeline layout modules
axis label hideOverlap uses label layout helpers
build system produces core bundles and versions
